productName: Heavenly Buds Moroccan Hash - Rainbow Sherbert #11 - 1g
description: A hybrid hashish made from Rainbow Sherbert #11, dry-sifted resin pressed into a smooth, potent block that honors a craft thousands of years in the making. Old-world craft, modern flavor, a sweet, creamy, fruity aroma with a relaxed, happy feel, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience.
